pre_registered_criterion: Wilson 95% CI of observed p(HIGH) overlaps Session 5 P2a baseline CI [25.5%, 43.7%] AND the canonical-SHA multiset is not invariant under pinned-substrate repetition (each run produces its own canonical SHA because harmonic basin selection is IID Bernoulli per Session 5).
verdict_interpretation: Dynamics-layer substrate invariance confirmed. Observed p(HIGH) under pinned Prime-core cpu7 / airplane preserved / fan auto / walt governor is statistically indistinguishable from Session 5 P2a baseline (asym=0, independent session). The 50 distinct canonical SHAs reflect the per-episode IID Bernoulli RNG that Session 5 P2a confirmed at N=100; they are the correct signature of stochastic-selection dynamics, NOT a substrate-coupling signature.
